assets.name: Archive
assets.description: Archive lets you capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes through folders, labels, backlinks, and graph traversal.
assets.designIntent: Logo for capability entity capability.archive, generated from web/app/src/lib/galaxy/registry.ts.

versions.prompt:
Create a premium Core capability logo for Archive. It should share the Vorinthex master logo style: polished chrome, dark inner field, minimal geometric symbol, circular framing, and no text. Abstractly communicate: Capture notes, ideas, research, labels, folders, semantic search, and graph-based knowledge connections.

Keep the whole family visually consistent with the existing Vorinthex AI logo:
- obsidian black base
- polished chrome / silver material
- dark glass inner negative space
- one clear central geometric mark
- premium enterprise AI tone
- symmetrical, engineered, timeless
- fill 88-95% of the 1024x1024 box
- no text, no letters, no watermark, no colorful background

Entity metadata:
Name: Archive
Type: capability
Tagline: Your second brain
Description: Archive lets you capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes through folders, labels, backlinks, and graph traversal.
Key ideas: Capture ideas, research, meeting notes, and daily thoughts.; Organize notes into folders and labels.; Search semantically and traverse knowledge relationships..
versions.fullPrompt:
# Solid Prompt

# System Identity
You are the Vorinthex AI local design engine.
Create premium, minimal, production-ready brand assets.
Preserve locked identity rules exactly and never introduce text, watermarks, or unrelated symbols.
For logo/icon work, the mark must use the canvas assertively: fill roughly 90% of the 1024x1024 box, with only a small safe margin.
Avoid tiny centered logos, excessive empty border space, distant camera framing, or a badge floating in the middle of the canvas.

# Design System
# Vorinthex AI Design System

## Brand Essence

Vorinthex AI should feel like obsidian intelligence: dark, premium, metallic, exact and futuristic.

## Visual Language

- Obsidian black base
- Chrome silver highlights
- Dark glass materials
- Subtle glow only
- No colorful gradients
- No gold unless explicitly requested
- No blue unless explicitly requested
- No neon cyberpunk colors
- No childish effects
- No cartoon styling
- No excessive sparkles
- No glitter overload
- Premium, minimal, industrial
- Apple x Nothing x Dyson x Interstellar
- High contrast
- Sharp geometry
- Symmetry
- Lots of negative space

## Logo Requirements

- 3D chrome / polished metal
- Clean silhouette
- Strong app-icon readability
- Works at small size
- Should look premium on black
- Should also work on transparent background
- Avoid overcomplicated internal details
- Avoid random symbols
- Avoid extra text in logo exports

## Export Requirements

Every generated logo must produce:

1. 1024x1024 PNG with solid obsidian background
2. 1024x1024 PNG with full transparent background
3. Metadata JSON
4. Prompt snapshot
5. Review notes
6. Optional lock file if accepted


# Baseline Prompt
# Baseline Image Prompt

Create a premium, minimal, 3D metallic logo/icon for Vorinthex AI.

Use a dark obsidian and chrome design language.
The logo must be centered, symmetrical and fill almost the whole 1024x1024 canvas.
Target 88-95% canvas occupancy with only a small 4-6% safe margin.
Do not make a small centered emblem with large empty margins.
Use realistic polished metal with subtle reflections.
Keep the background clean.
Do not include text unless explicitly requested.
Do not add unrelated symbols.
Do not add excessive glitter, stars, flares or noise.
The result must feel like a high-end AI company asset.


# Mode
Generate a production-quality 1024x1024 PNG logo asset.
The visual mark must fill 88-95% of the canvas, remain centered, and avoid cropping.
Use an app-icon composition: large, close, readable, and nearly edge-to-edge with a controlled 4-6% safe margin.
Do not create a small emblem surrounded by large empty background space.

# Locked Rules
No asset lock is currently active.

# Rejected Directions To Avoid
# Rejected Directions


# Asset

assets.designIntent: Logo for capability entity capability.gallery, generated from web/app/src/lib/galaxy/registry.ts.

versions.prompt:
Create a premium Core capability logo for Gallery. It should share the Vorinthex master logo style: polished chrome, dark inner field, minimal geometric symbol, circular framing, and no text. Abstractly communicate: A smart image and memory library with albums, clusters, sharing links, QR invites, and AI-powered discovery.

Keep the whole family visually consistent with the existing Vorinthex AI logo:
- obsidian black base
- polished chrome / silver material
- dark glass inner negative space
- one clear central geometric mark
- premium enterprise AI tone
- symmetrical, engineered, timeless
- fill 88-95% of the 1024x1024 box
- no text, no letters, no watermark, no colorful background

Entity metadata:
Name: Gallery
Type: capability
Tagline: Your memories, organized
Description: Gallery organizes memories and images into smart albums, clusters, shared links, QR invites, and AI-powered discovery.
Key ideas: Organize images into AI-generated albums and clusters.; Invite others to albums with QR codes or links.; Search memories by people, places, dates, and events..
versions.fullPrompt:
# Solid Prompt

# System Identity
You are the Vorinthex AI local design engine.
Create premium, minimal, production-ready brand assets.
Preserve locked identity rules exactly and never introduce text, watermarks, or unrelated symbols.
For logo/icon work, the mark must use the canvas assertively: fill roughly 90% of the 1024x1024 box, with only a small safe margin.
Avoid tiny centered logos, excessive empty border space, distant camera framing, or a badge floating in the middle of the canvas.

# Design System
# Vorinthex AI Design System

## Brand Essence

Vorinthex AI should feel like obsidian intelligence: dark, premium, metallic, exact and futuristic.

## Visual Language

- Obsidian black base
- Chrome silver highlights
- Dark glass materials
- Subtle glow only
- No colorful gradients
- No gold unless explicitly requested
- No blue unless explicitly requested
- No neon cyberpunk colors
- No childish effects
- No cartoon styling
- No excessive sparkles
- No glitter overload
- Premium, minimal, industrial
- Apple x Nothing x Dyson x Interstellar
- High contrast
- Sharp geometry
- Symmetry
- Lots of negative space

## Logo Requirements

- 3D chrome / polished metal
- Clean silhouette
- Strong app-icon readability
- Works at small size
- Should look premium on black
- Should also work on transparent background
- Avoid overcomplicated internal details
- Avoid random symbols
- Avoid extra text in logo exports

## Export Requirements

Every generated logo must produce:

1. 1024x1024 PNG with solid obsidian background
2. 1024x1024 PNG with full transparent background
3. Metadata JSON
4. Prompt snapshot
5. Review notes
6. Optional lock file if accepted


# Baseline Prompt
# Baseline Image Prompt

Create a premium, minimal, 3D metallic logo/icon for Vorinthex AI.

Use a dark obsidian and chrome design language.
The logo must be centered, symmetrical and fill almost the whole 1024x1024 canvas.
Target 88-95% canvas occupancy with only a small 4-6% safe margin.
Do not make a small centered emblem with large empty margins.
Use realistic polished metal with subtle reflections.
Keep the background clean.
Do not include text unless explicitly requested.
Do not add unrelated symbols.
Do not add excessive glitter, stars, flares or noise.
The result must feel like a high-end AI company asset.


# Mode
Generate a production-quality 1024x1024 PNG logo asset.
The visual mark must fill 88-95% of the canvas, remain centered, and avoid cropping.
Use an app-icon composition: large, close, readable, and nearly edge-to-edge with a controlled 4-6% safe margin.
Do not create a small emblem surrounded by large empty background space.

# Locked Rules
No asset lock is currently active.

# Rejected Directions To Avoid
# Rejected Directions


# Asset

- fill 88-95% of the 1024x1024 box

- fill 88-95% of the 1024x1024 box
- no text, no letters, no watermark, no colorful background

# Solid Prompt

# System Identity
You are the Vorinthex AI local design engine.
Create premium, minimal, production-ready brand assets.
Preserve locked identity rules exactly and never introduce text, watermarks, or unrelated symbols.
For logo/icon work, the mark must use the canvas assertively: fill roughly 90% of the 1024x1024 box, with only a small safe margin.
Avoid tiny centered logos, excessive empty border space, distant camera framing, or a badge floating in the middle of the canvas.

# Design System
# Vorinthex AI Design System

## Brand Essence

Vorinthex AI should feel like obsidian intelligence: dark, premium, metallic, exact and futuristic.

## Visual Language

- Obsidian black base
- Chrome silver highlights
- Dark glass materials
- Subtle glow only
- No colorful gradients
- No gold unless explicitly requested
- No blue unless explicitly requested
- No neon cyberpunk colors
- No childish effects
- No cartoon styling
- No excessive sparkles
- No glitter overload
- Premium, minimal, industrial
- Apple x Nothing x Dyson x Interstellar
- High contrast
- Sharp geometry
- Symmetry
- Lots of negative space

## Logo Requirements

- 3D chrome / polished metal
- Clean silhouette
- Strong app-icon readability
- Works at small size
- Should look premium on black
- Should also work on transparent background
- Avoid overcomplicated internal details
- Avoid random symbols
- Avoid extra text in logo exports

## Export Requirements

Every generated logo must produce:

1. 1024x1024 PNG with solid obsidian background
2. 1024x1024 PNG with full transparent background
3. Metadata JSON
4. Prompt snapshot
5. Review notes
6. Optional lock file if accepted


# Baseline Prompt
# Baseline Image Prompt

Create a premium, minimal, 3D metallic logo/icon for Vorinthex AI.

Use a dark obsidian and chrome design language.
The logo must be centered, symmetrical and fill almost the whole 1024x1024 canvas.
Target 88-95% canvas occupancy with only a small 4-6% safe margin.
Do not make a small centered emblem with large empty margins.
Use realistic polished metal with subtle reflections.
Keep the background clean.
Do not include text unless explicitly requested.
Do not add unrelated symbols.
Do not add excessive glitter, stars, flares or noise.
The result must feel like a high-end AI company asset.


# Mode
Generate a production-quality 1024x1024 PNG logo asset.
The visual mark must fill 88-95% of the canvas, remain centered, and avoid cropping.
Use an app-icon composition: large, close, readable, and nearly edge-to-edge with a controlled 4-6% safe margin.
Do not create a small emblem surrounded by large empty background space.

# Locked Rules
No asset lock is currently active.

versions.fullPrompt:
# Solid Prompt

# System Identity
You are the Vorinthex AI local design engine.
Create premium, minimal, production-ready brand assets.
Preserve locked identity rules exactly and never introduce text, watermarks, or unrelated symbols.

# Design System
# Vorinthex AI Design System

## Brand Essence

Vorinthex AI should feel like obsidian intelligence: dark, premium, metallic, exact and futuristic.

## Visual Language

- Obsidian black base
- Chrome silver highlights
- Dark glass materials
- Subtle glow only
- No colorful gradients
- No gold unless explicitly requested
- No blue unless explicitly requested
- No neon cyberpunk colors
- No childish effects
- No cartoon styling
- No excessive sparkles
- No glitter overload
- Premium, minimal, industrial
- Apple x Nothing x Dyson x Interstellar
- High contrast
- Sharp geometry
- Symmetry
- Lots of negative space

## Logo Requirements

- 3D chrome / polished metal
- Clean silhouette
- Strong app-icon readability
- Works at small size
- Should look premium on black
- Should also work on transparent background
- Avoid overcomplicated internal details
- Avoid random symbols
- Avoid extra text in logo exports

## Export Requirements

Every generated logo must produce:

1. 1024x1024 PNG with solid obsidian background
2. 1024x1024 PNG with full transparent background
3. Metadata JSON
4. Prompt snapshot
5. Review notes
6. Optional lock file if accepted


# Baseline Prompt
# Baseline Image Prompt

Create a premium, minimal, 3D metallic logo/icon for Vorinthex AI.

Use a dark obsidian and chrome design language.
The logo must be centered, symmetrical and fill most of a 1024x1024 canvas.
Use realistic polished metal with subtle reflections.
Keep the background clean.
Do not include text unless explicitly requested.
Do not add unrelated symbols.
Do not add excessive glitter, stars, flares or noise.
The result must feel like a high-end AI company asset.


# Mode
Generate a production-quality 1024x1024 PNG logo asset.
The visual mark should fill 85-95% of the canvas, remain centered, and avoid cropping.

# Locked Rules
No asset lock is currently active.

# Rejected Directions To Avoid
# Rejected Directions


# Asset
Name: vorinthex-ai-transparent-logo
Slug: vorinthex-ai-transparent-logo
Category: master-brand
Description: A minimal chrome circular ring enclosing a sharp downward triangular nexus emblem. The icon should be clean, dark, premium and metallic. The inner field should be dark/transparent depending on export. No text. No extra glitter. The symbol should fill most of the 1024x1024 canvas.

# Current Instruction
Create the definitive master logo for Vorinthex AI.A perfectly symmetrical circular chrome ring en

# Export Requirements
Export on solid obsidian background .
Image size: 1024x1024
The visual mark must fill 85-95% of the canvas and remain centered.

# Negative Prompt
Do not include text.
Do not include watermark.
Do not include colored background.
Do not include red, pink, purple, blue or gold backgrounds.
Do not include glitter overload.
Do not include excessive sparkles.
Do not include unrelated symbols.
Do not create a badge that looks like a gaming logo.
Do not create a cartoon.
Do not create a flat icon unless requested.
Do not crop the logo.
Do not leave excessive empty margins.
Do not add shadows that require a background.
Do not add random letters.
Do not change locked geometry.
